LanguageData.SD_DroneType_Minipulser.label: Minipulser Drone
LanguageData.SD_DroneType_Minipulser.description: A drone pattern built for high-rate pulse suppression against close and mid-range targets.
LanguageData.SD_DroneType_Laser.label: Laser Drone
LanguageData.SD_DroneType_Laser.description: A drone pattern equipped with a sustained laser weapon, favoring accurate long-range strikes.
